    www/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Swagger: update to 0.3.0

    From https://metacpan.org/dist/Dancer-Plugin-Swagger/changes :
    0.3.0 2021-06-03
     [ENHANCEMENTS]
     - use Module::Version for API version munging. (GH#3, Mike Whitaker)
    0.2.1 2021-05-30
     [BUG FIXES]
